root_cause.summary: Spring Boot PR build failed at the Gradle `:module:spring-boot-actuator:checkFormatMain` task because the file `src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/actuate/sbom/SbomProperties.java` has formatting violations under Spring Boot's Spring Java Format checker. The build's What-went-wrong block (L6190-6195) names the failed task and the single offending file and tells the developer to `Run \`format\` to fix.` This is a deterministic code-style gate; one task fails out of 2594 actionable Gradle tasks. The failure propagates: BUILD FAILED in 11m 27s (L6202) → ##[error]Process completed with exit code 1 (L6203).

required_signals.value: Formatting violations found in the following files:

evidence_spans.reason: First FAILED marker for the gradle task. Identifies which subproject and which task hit the failure.

Self-contained failure block: `FAILURE: Build failed with an exception. * What went wrong: Execution failed for task ':module:spring-boot-actuator:checkFormatMain'. > Formatting violations found in the following files: * src/main/java/org/springframework/boot/actuate/sbom/SbomProperties.java   Run \`format\` to fix.` + BUILD FAILED in 11m 27s + GHA exit 1. The named file path tells the diagnoser exactly where to apply the formatter.

must_not_claim: the test source code is wrong
